questions.text: What is the core mathematical mechanism behind GPTQ updates?
options: Using the inverse Hessian matrix to adjust remaining weights to compensate for quantization error.
questions.correct_answer: Using the inverse Hessian matrix to adjust remaining weights to compensate for quantization error.
questions.explanation: GPTQ solves the quadratic error minimization task using the inverse Hessian matrix, updating parameter matrices row by row.
